title: Newegg Swings to Positive Adjusted EBITDA on 2025 Growth, Targets Profit in 2026
text:
Newegg Commerce (NEGG) - FY2025 Results & 2026 Guidance from The Globe and Mail.

Key Financial Results (FY2025): Revenue & Growth Metrics. Gross Merchandise Value (GMV): $1.77 billion, up 15.4% YoY. Net sales: $1.44 billion, up 16.9% YoY. Gross profit: $168.5 million.

Profitability Turnaround: Net loss narrowed to $4.9 million (significant improvement). Adjusted EBITDA: $24.8 million profit (swung from prior-year loss).

2026 Guidance: The company projects for the coming fiscal year. Net sales: $1.23 billion to $1.47 billion. GMV: $1.50 billion to $1.79 billion. Gross profit: $144.0 million to $170.9 million. Return to net income: $6.1 million to $15.7 million. Positive adjusted EBITDA expected.

Growth Drivers: Management attributed improvements to strong demand for next-generation GPUs and AI-focused PC components, successful holiday promotions, and inventory management discipline. The company is investing in gaming-focused branding and agentic AI commerce partnerships.

Analyst Assessment: TipRanks' AI Analyst rates NEGG as Neutral, citing weak profitability metrics and unfavorable technical signals despite improved cash flow.
